title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 442.095 - Sections 442.090 to 442.120 applicable to whom
text:
442.095.  Sections 442.090 to 442.120 applicable to whom. — The provisions of sections 442.090 to 442.120 inclusive shall apply to any person otherwise eligible for a loan, guaranty, or insurance on a loan, pursuant to the Act of Congress of the United States entitled the Servicemen's Readjustment Act of 1944, as amended, and the minor spouse of any eligible veteran.
(L. 1953 p. 616, A.L. 1999 H.B. 136 merged with S.B. 188)
